absorption: Session genelinde ask absorption olusmus (sell_volume 6.4M > buy_volume 3.6M), fiyat VAL altinda kalip CVD -2.7M ile forte bearish baski vardir.
dom_observation: Bid/ask ratio 1.17 - satis baskisi baslamis, ask depth 60 bid depth 71'e karsitik, equilibrium bozulmasi satis lehine.
htf_alignment: 5m/15m BEAR (kisa vade satis onus), 1h/4h BULL (guclu direnç), zitlik var ama 5m+15m dominant = kisa vade SELL sinyali gecerli.
session_bias: Buy/sell ratio 0.57 (<0.8) + CVD deeply negative + sell volume 1.75x buy volume = guc satis tarafinda, session delta -2.76M ile gun boyunca kurumsal satis yapmis.
reasoning: CVD divergence ile fiyat 64390'da dagili yukselmekte ama global kurumsal satis baskisi artiyor (ask absorption + negatif CVD), HTF 5m/15m BEAR alignment ve session sell dominance ile short setup net.
